The Essentials

to know

Order of the Day

A day to
remember

From ceremony to dancing under the stars — here's how the day will unfold.

1:45 PM
Guests Arrive
Welcome to the Temple of Apollo, Stourhead. Please take your seats.
2:00 PM
The Ceremony
The wedding ceremony takes place at the Temple of Apollo. Approx. 45 minutes.
3:30 PM
Drinks & Photographs
Champagne reception and informal photos in the chapel gardens.
4:30 PM
Transfer to Reception
Coaches depart for Horrell & Horrell, Somerset. Details to follow.
5:00 PM
Welcome at Horrell & Horrell
Canapés, cocktails, and a warm Somerset welcome.
7:00 PM
Wedding Breakfast
Sit-down dinner with Italian-inspired menu. Speeches during the meal.
9:30 PM
First Dance & Evening
Dancing, music, and celebrations into the night. Evening guests join from 9 PM.
12:00 AM
Last Orders
The venue closes. Taxis will be available. What a night!

The Bridge at Stourhead

Accommodation

Where to
rest your head

We've gathered a few recommendations for all budgets, all within easy reach of both the ceremony and reception. We suggest booking early — London fills up fast in the summer!
